description: A repeated blocker should remain visible as a durable blocker-style outcome.

payload.meetingNotes: Track staging blockers and repeated validation failures.
payload.focusSummary: Migration validation failed again in staging and is blocking the rollout.

focusAreas.summary: Migration validation keeps failing in staging
focusAreas.detail: Repeated staging failures continue to block the release candidate and require a clearly owned remediation.
evidence: Mina: The migration check failed again on the same validation step.
